degraded_reason: Single ready bead implemented directly by parent; independent Codex reviewer subagents used for review gate.
review_blocker_summary: Initial API/schema/redaction freeze review requested a consumable public Observation contract and a public source for correlation.tool_call_id.
Initial failure/recorder/exporter freeze review requested explicit dirty-state clearing semantics for dropped/non-retryable failures.
Updated contracts with public Observation and RedactionRecord shapes, Correlation.ToolCallID mapping, resolved dependency/freeze notes, error_handler terminology, and dirty-state clearing rules.
Focused re-reviews approved both blocker sets with no remaining blocking findings.
